errors.cooldown: ⏱️ | Cooldown Alert: Please wait **{seconds}** more seconds before using the **/{command}** command again!
errors.commandExecution: ❌ | Apologies, an error occurred while executing your command. Check the logs for the error.
errors.genericAction: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, there was an error {action}. Please try again.
errors.failedToFindSongQuery: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, couldn't find the song with the requested query.
errors.failedToFindSong: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, couldn't find the song.
errors.playRequest: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong whilst attempting to play the requested song. Please try again.
errors.addTracks: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, failed to add the track(s) to the queue.
errors.joinVoice: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, couldn't join your channel.
errors.joinVoiceChannel: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, couldn't join your voice channel.
errors.playback: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, there was a playback related error. Please try again.
errors.noViewChannel: Error: I do not have permission to view this channel and cannot edit the help message!
errors.extractFailed: ❌ | Failed to extract the following song... skipping to the next!
errors.subsonicSongMetadata: ❌ | Could not load song metadata from Subsonic.
errors.jellyfinSongMetadata: ❌ | Could not load song metadata from Jellyfin.
errors.multipleTrackMatches: ❌ | Multiple tracks matched your search. Please use a more specific query.
errors.emptyPlaylist: ❌ | This playlist has no playable tracks.
errors.emptyAlbum: ❌ | This album has no playable tracks.
errors.failedToFindMediaQuery: ❌ | Ooops... something went wrong, couldn't find the song, playlist, or album with the requested query.
errors.playNextPlaylistOnly: ❌ | Ooops... you can only add single songs with this command. Use the regular **/play** command to add playlists to the queue.
errors.transitionInProgress: ⏳ | A track transition is already in progress. Please wait a moment.
errors.fadeinSoftTransition: ❌ | The Fadein audio filter cannot be enabled while soft transitions are active.

actions.removingSong: removing the song from the queue

feature.plexDisabled: ❌ | Plex is currently disabled! Ask the server admin to enable and configure this in the environment file.
feature.subsonicDisabled: ❌ | Subsonic is currently disabled! Ask the server admin to enable and configure this in the environment file.
feature.jellyfinDisabled: ❌ | Jellyfin is currently disabled! Ask the server admin to enable and configure this in the environment file.

guards.djMode: ❌ | DJ Mode is active! You must have the DJ role {role} to use any music commands!
guards.notInVoice: ❌ | You are not in a voice channel!
guards.notInBotVoice: ❌ | You are not in my voice channel!

queue.nothingPlaying: ❌ | No music is currently being played!
queue.empty: ❌ | There is no music is currently in the queue!
queue.alreadyFirstPage: ❌ | The queue is already on the first page!
queue.alreadyLastPage: ❌ | The queue is already on the last page!
queue.title: Current Music Queue 🎵
queue.clearDescription: The entire music queue has been cleared!
queue.shuffleDescription: The entire music queue has been shuffled!
queue.expired: Please use **/queue** again to show the embed again.
queue.historyExpired: Please use **/queuehistory** again to show the embed again.

volume.current: 🔊 | The current volume is set to **{volume}%**!
volume.invalidRange: ❌ | The volume must be set between 0-100%!

loop.description: The loop mode has been set to {mode}!

seek.title: Seek song ↪️
seek.description: Seeked the current song to {time}! Currently playing {title} {link}.

remove.title: Song removed ❌
remove.invalidPosition: ❌ | There is no song at the queried position in the queue. Please try again.

lyrics.notFound: ❌ | No lyrics were found for the requested query!
lyrics.title: Lyrics for {title} by {artist} 🎶

audiofilter.noneEnabled: There are currently no audio filters enabled!
audiofilter.listEnabled:
The currently enabled audio filters are:
- {filters}

playback.addedTopTitle: Added to the top of the queue ⏱️
playback.queuedSongTop: Added song **{title}** {link} to the top of the queue (playing next)!
playback.importedPlaylistStart: Imported the **{title} {link} playlist** with **{count}** songs and started to play the queue!
playback.importedPlaylistTop: Imported the **{title} {link} playlist** with **{count}** songs to the top of the queue (playing next)!
playback.importedAlbumStart: Imported the **{title} album** with **{count}** songs and started to play the queue!
playback.importedAlbumTop: Imported the **{title} album** with **{count}** songs to the top of the queue (playing next)!

commands.jumpqueue: Jump to a specific song in the queue!
commands.lyrics: Get the lyrics for a song!
commands.pause: Pause the current song at the current time!
commands.play: Place a song into the queue!
commands.playnext: Add a song to the top of the queue!

plex.description: Play music from your Plex library into the queue!
plex.play: Play a track, playlist, or album from your Plex server.
plex.playnext: Add a track, playlist, or album from your Plex server to play next.

commands.queue: Check the current music that is in the queue!
commands.queuehistory: Check the past history of the queue within the guild!
commands.remove: Remove a specific song from the queue!
commands.seek: Seek to another time in the current song!

subsonic.description: Play music from your Subsonic library into the queue!
subsonic.play: Play a track, playlist, or album from your Subsonic server.
subsonic.playnext: Add a track, playlist, or album from your Subsonic server to play next.

jellyfin.description: Play music from your Jellyfin library into the queue!
jellyfin.play: Play a track, playlist, or album from your Jellyfin server.
jellyfin.playnext: Add a track, playlist, or album from your Jellyfin server to play next.

commands.volume: Check or set the current music volume!

music.play: Either the name, URL or playlist URL you want to play.
music.playnext: Either the name or URL of the song you want to play (no playlists).
music.library: Search query for a track, playlist, or album.

options.filter: What filter do you want to toggle?
options.query: Enter the name of the song.

song.remove: What #no. song should be removed from the queue?
song.jumpqueue: What #no. song should be moved to the front of the queue (use /queue to check)?

options.time: The time to seek the current song (Examples: 1s, 1m, 1h)!
options.amount: What do you want to set the volume as (0-100)?
options.loopmode: What loop mode do you want to activate?
options.scope: Pick what type of content to search for.
options.order: Order used when adding multiple tracks from a playlist or album.

help.title: Elite Music - Help Menu
help.homeDescription:
Select a category via the menu below to view the commands available. 📢 

Experiencing a bug or have a great suggestion for improvement? Please create an issue on the **[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ThatGuyJacobee/Elite-Music)** or contact me by joining the **[Support Discord Server](https://discord.elite-bot.com)** and it will be reviewed as soon as possible. 🆘

For in-depth setup information, please browse the **[GitHub Repository ReadMe](https://github.com/ThatGuyJacobee/Elite-Music)** which is always maintained up-to-date and provides you with everything you need to know. 📄
help.menuPlaceholder: Click to see all the categories

botinfo.author: {tag} - Bot Info
botinfo.title: Elite Music Information
botinfo.openSourceDescription: Are you interested in improving this open source bot? Or are you looking to host this yourself? Look no further! You can access the public bot [repository here](https://github.com/ThatGuyJacobee/Elite-Bot-Music) and follow the readme instructions for more info! :)

search.resultsDescription: Found multiple songs matching the provided search query, select one form the menu below.
search.multipleResults: Found multiple results matching the provided search query, select one from the menu below.
search.singleResult: Select an item below to add it to the queue.

np.backDescription: Returning next to the previous song: {title} {link}!
np.backMissing: ❌ | There is no music history prior to the current song. Please try again.
np.stopDescription: Music has been stopped... leaving the channel!
np.loopOffDescription: The loop mode has been set to **off**!
np.loopTrackDescription: The loop mode has been set to the **current track**!
np.volumeDescription: The volume has been set to **{volume}%**!
np.volumeModalLabel: What should the new volume be (0-100)?
np.volumeModalInvalid: ❌ | The volume must be between 0-100, your input was outside of this.

lifecycle.disconnectDescription: I've been inactive for a period of time!
lifecycle.emptyChannelDescription: Nobody is in the voice channel!
lifecycle.queueFinishedDescription: The music queue has been finished!
